description: NYSDOH: General operating rooms minimum 400 sq ft net clear floor area, excluding scrub sink alcoves and fixed casework.
citation: NY 10 NYCRR Part 405 / NYSDOH CONH Guidelines

description: NYSDOH: Single-bed patient rooms minimum 160 sq ft; multi-bed rooms minimum 130 sq ft per bed space.
NYSDOH: ICU cubicle minimum 225 sq ft clear floor area per bed; open bay minimum 180 sq ft per bed.
NYSDOH: Emergency department treatment rooms minimum 150 sq ft each; trauma bays minimum 250 sq ft.
NYSDOH: All new hospital construction and major renovation requires Certificate of Need (CON) approval prior to construction.
citation: NY Public Health Law Article 28 — Certificate of Need

description: NYSDOH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width; exit access corridors serving patient sleeping areas minimum 8 ft.
NYSDOH: Operating rooms minimum 20 ACH total air supply, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
NYSDOH: Hospital pharmacies require dedicated sterile compounding room with ISO Class 7 anteroom, documented in CON filings.
NYSDOH: Inpatient psychiatric unit patient rooms minimum 100 sq ft; day room / group activity area minimum 40 sq ft per patient.
